schemas.description: Scenario contract accepted by run, score, and run-suite.
schemas.name: scenario

schemas.description: Canonical normalized trace emitted as normalized_trace.json.
schemas.name: trace

schemas.description: Deterministic scorecard emitted as scorecard.json.
schemas.name: scorecard

schemas.description: Task-completion verdict embedded in scorecards and emitted as task_completion.json.
schemas.name: task_completion

schemas.description: Deterministic before/after state diff emitted as state_diff.json.
schemas.name: state_diff

schemas.description: Compact per-run evidence digest emitted as run_digest.json.
schemas.name: run_digest

schemas.description: Live Hermes runtime smoke summary emitted by scripts/live_hermes_smoke.py.
schemas.name: live_smoke_summary

schemas.description: Evidence handoff manifest emitted by evidence-bundle.
schemas.name: evidence_bundle

schemas.description: Next-iteration improvement plan over evidence bundle, repair queue, curriculum, and run digests.
schemas.name: improvement_plan

schemas.description: Longitudinal ledger over concrete improvement-plan work items.
schemas.name: improvement_ledger

schemas.description: Policy gate over concrete improvement-ledger repair pressure.
schemas.name: improvement_ledger_gate

schemas.description: Manifest for export-rl training handoffs.
schemas.name: training_manifest

schemas.description: Canonical episode row emitted in export-rl episodes.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_episode

schemas.description: Terminal reward row emitted in export-rl rewards.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_reward

schemas.description: Step-level reward attribution row emitted in export-rl step_rewards.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_step_reward

schemas.description: Preference row emitted in export-rl preferences.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_preference

schemas.description: Failed-rule curriculum row emitted in export-rl failure_modes.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_failure_mode

schemas.description: Failure-mode curriculum metadata emitted in export-rl curriculum.json.
schemas.name: rl_curriculum

schemas.description: Trainer-ready supervised fine-tuning row emitted in export-rl sft.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_sft

schemas.description: Trainer-ready direct-preference row emitted in export-rl dpo.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_dpo

schemas.description: Trainer-ready reward-model row emitted in export-rl reward_model.jsonl.
schemas.name: rl_reward_model

schemas.description: Dataset quality metrics emitted in export-rl dataset_metrics.json.
schemas.name: rl_dataset_metrics

schemas.description: Deterministic train/validation/test split metadata emitted by export-rl.
schemas.name: dataset_splits

schemas.description: Manifest for export-compare-rl improvement-pair handoffs.
schemas.name: compare_rl_manifest

schemas.description: Baseline-vs-candidate improvement pair row emitted in export-compare-rl improvement_pairs.jsonl.
schemas.name: compare_rl_pair

schemas.description: Trainer-ready comparison DPO row emitted in export-compare-rl improvement_dpo.jsonl.
schemas.name: compare_rl_dpo

schemas.description: Manifest for export-review human review queues.
schemas.name: review_manifest

schemas.description: Manifest for apply-review reviewed trainer handoffs.
schemas.name: reviewed_manifest

schemas.description: Trainer preflight launch guard over passed gates and trainer-facing artifacts.
schemas.name: trainer_preflight

schemas.description: Consumer-side trainer launch decision over a validated trainer preflight.
schemas.name: trainer_launch_check

schemas.description: Portable trainer handoff archive manifest with copied evidence artifact hashes.
schemas.name: trainer_archive

schemas.description: Consumer-side readiness check over a trainer archive and local external trainer code paths.
schemas.name: trainer_archive_check

schemas.description: Side-effect-free trainer consumer plan derived from a trainer archive readiness check.
schemas.name: trainer_consumer_plan

schemas.description: Dry-run receipt from the reference external trainer wrapper consuming a trainer consumer plan.
schemas.name: trainer_wrapper_dry_run
